questionHtml:
A planet has an albedo of 0.30. A simplified energy balance for the planet is shown.

What is the intensity radiated by the surface of the planet?


A.  70 W m−2

B.  90 W m−2

C.  100 W m−2

D.  130 W m−2

meta.title: A planet has an albedo of 0.30. A simplified energy balance for the planet is shown. What is the intensity radiated by the surface of the planet? A. 70 W m−2 B. 90 W m−2 C. 100 W m
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
